subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath sent down the verses, made manifest the clear proofs, and caused every atom to proclaim that there is none other God but Him, the All-Powerful, Who doeth whatsoever He willeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل الایات و اظهر البینات و انطق الذرات علی انه لا اله الا هو و هو المقتدر علی ما یشآء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
